description_long: This bungalow features a two-story structure with a prominent orange gable roof and a wraparound fenced yard. The front facade includes a covered porch with decorative railings and striped orange-and-white awnings over the windows and entrance. The property is landscaped with several trees, shrubs, and a small conifer, and includes a driveway with a parked blue vehicle. The rear of the house has a patio area with a canopy and additional greenery, as well as a visible outdoor pool. The exterior walls are primarily white with brick accents on the corners and porch columns. The overall design is compact, with a mix of open green space and built elements, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A two-story bungalow with an orange gable roof, covered porch, striped awnings, fenced yard, and landscaped greenery, including a driveway and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, orange gable roof, striped awnings, and landscaped yard with trees and a fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long roofline, striped awning over the side entrance, and partial view of the yard and fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway with a blue vehicle, patio area, striped awnings, and a mix of trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard with a pool, more greenery, and the rear patio area with a canopy.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
